description: Fetch the executor return value of a previously broadcast smart contract Execute. Maps the node's TransactionResultGet → a JSON-friendly value. Variant types decoded: scalar primitives, v_string, v_byte_array (base64), v_amount {integral,fraction}, v_array/v_list/v_set/v_map.
notes: For getCounter() returning int the result is an integer. For methods returning byte[] the result is base64. For methods returning java.math.BigDecimal-style amounts, the result is {integral, fraction}. Methods returning void give null.
